title: BH21 3BW, MVV Environment Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/SP3127SF/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: MVV Environment Limited Installation name: Canford Energy from Waste Combined Heat and Power Facility Permit number: EPR/SP3127SF  "
